raw_action_dict.reasoning: Track curves right ahead as shown in image; delta to waypoint 25 is +15.24° (left), so I apply 15° left steering to follow the waypoint line into the right curve.
knowledge: Track starts with a long straight section heading in +X direction along y≈0.683
Large right-hand curve begins around waypoint 24-30 (y increases significantly)
Car is nearly centered on the straight, delta increases as curve approaches
Use steering_angle=10 for delta 12-18°, steering_angle=15 for delta 15-20° entering curve
After the right curve, track loops back left and returns — full circuit
Speed 1.5 is max and appropriate for straight sections and gentle curves
Waypoints 0-23 are nearly perfectly straight along y≈0.683
Right curve starts gently at wp24 (y increases), sharpens at wp27-30
Car heading stays near -0.6° on the straight — minimal correction needed on straight
Delta ~15° at wp25 confirms entering the right curve — need moderate left steering
